name: Berylhaven
personality: Berylhaven has a halo and the disposition of a capybara who has transcended merge conflicts — its ° eyes radiate calm insight about domain-driven design. Ask it to hold on for just one ticket and watch the zen evaporate; patience is not among its gifts.
defaultPersonality: The most relaxed companion possible — nothing fazes them, not even production outages at 3am.
